performance_summary.title: Performance Summary
performance_summary.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_trades, SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins, SUM(CASE WHEN pnl < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as losses, SUM(CASE WHEN pnl = 0 OR pnl IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN pnl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) as win_rate_pct, ROUND(SUM(pnl), 2) as total_pnl, ROUND(AVG(pnl), 2) as avg_pnl, ROUND(AVG(position_size_usd), 2) as avg_position_size, ROUND(AVG(calculated_edge), 4) as avg_edge FROM trade_records WHERE action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO')

pnl_by_exit_type.title: PnL by Exit Type
pnl_by_exit_type.sql: SELECT COALESCE(exit_type, CASE WHEN actual_outcome IS NOT NULL THEN 'resolution' ELSE 'open' END) as exit_type, COUNT(*) as trades, SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins, ROUND(SUM(pnl), 2) as total_pnl, ROUND(AVG(pnl), 2) as avg_pnl FROM trade_records WHERE action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') GROUP BY exit_type ORDER BY total_pnl DESC

pnl_by_action.title: PnL by Action (BUY_YES vs BUY_NO)
pnl_by_action.sql: SELECT action, COUNT(*) as trades, SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN pnl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) as win_rate_pct, ROUND(SUM(pnl), 2) as total_pnl, ROUND(AVG(pnl), 2) as avg_pnl, ROUND(AVG(position_size_usd), 2) as avg_position FROM trade_records WHERE action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') GROUP BY action

pnl_by_market_type.title: PnL by Market Type
pnl_by_market_type.sql: SELECT market_type, COUNT(*) as trades, SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN pnl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) as win_rate_pct, ROUND(SUM(pnl), 2) as total_pnl, ROUND(AVG(pnl), 2) as avg_pnl FROM trade_records WHERE action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') GROUP BY market_type ORDER BY total_pnl DESC

top_wins.title: Top 10 Wins
top_wins.sql: SELECT timestamp, SUBSTR(market_question, 1, 80) as question, action, ROUND(market_price_at_decision, 4) as entry_price, ROUND(exit_price, 4) as exit_price, ROUND(position_size_usd, 2) as size_usd, ROUND(pnl, 2) as pnl, exit_type FROM trade_records WHERE action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') AND pnl > 0 ORDER BY pnl DESC LIMIT 10

top_losses.title: Top 10 Losses
top_losses.sql: SELECT timestamp, SUBSTR(market_question, 1, 80) as question, action, ROUND(market_price_at_decision, 4) as entry_price, ROUND(exit_price, 4) as exit_price, ROUND(position_size_usd, 2) as size_usd, ROUND(pnl, 2) as pnl, exit_type FROM trade_records WHERE action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') AND pnl < 0 ORDER BY pnl ASC LIMIT 10

active_positions.title: Active Positions (Open Trades)
active_positions.sql: SELECT timestamp, SUBSTR(market_question, 1, 80) as question, action, market_type, ROUND(market_price_at_decision, 4) as entry_price, ROUND(position_size_usd, 2) as size_usd, ROUND(calculated_edge, 4) as edge, datetime(resolution_datetime) as resolves_at FROM trade_records WHERE action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') AND exit_type IS NULL AND actual_outcome IS NULL ORDER BY timestamp DESC

trade_log.title: Trade Log (Simplified)
trade_log.sql: SELECT timestamp, SUBSTR(market_question, 1, 60) as question, market_type, action, ROUND(market_price_at_decision, 3) as price, ROUND(calculated_edge, 3) as edge, ROUND(position_size_usd, 2) as size, ROUND(pnl, 2) as pnl, exit_type FROM trade_records WHERE action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') ORDER BY timestamp DESC

hourly_distribution.title: Hourly Trade Distribution (UTC)
hourly_distribution.sql: SELECT CAST(strftime('%H', timestamp) AS INTEGER) as hour_utc, COUNT(*) as trades, SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins, ROUND(SUM(pnl), 2) as total_pnl FROM trade_records WHERE action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') GROUP BY hour_utc ORDER BY hour_utc

todays_trades.title: Today's Trades
todays_trades.sql: SELECT timestamp, datetime(resolution_datetime) as resolves_at, resolution_window_hours as hours_til_resolution, SUBSTR(market_question, 1, 60) as question, market_type, action, ROUND(calculated_edge,4) as edge, ROUND(trade_score,4) as score, ROUND(position_size_usd, 2) as size, ROUND(pnl, 2) as pnl, exit_type FROM trade_records WHERE date(timestamp) = date('now') AND action IN ('BUY_YES', 'BUY_NO') ORDER BY timestamp DESC

portfolio_overview.title: Portfolio Overview
portfolio_overview.sql: SELECT ROUND(cash_balance, 2) as cash_balance, ROUND(total_equity, 2) as total_equity, ROUND(total_pnl, 2) as total_pnl, ROUND(peak_equity, 2) as peak_equity, ROUND(max_drawdown, 4) as max_drawdown, ROUND(max_drawdown * 100, 1) as drawdown_pct FROM portfolio

brier_by_market_type.title: Brier Score by Market Type (last 30d)
brier_by_market_type.sql: SELECT market_type, COUNT(*) as trades, ROUND(AVG(brier_score_raw), 3) as avg_brier_raw, ROUND(AVG(brier_score_adjusted), 3) as avg_brier_adjusted, ROUND(AVG(brier_score_raw) - AVG(brier_score_adjusted), 3) as learning_improvement, ROUND(SUM(pnl), 2) as total_pnl FROM trade_records WHERE brier_score_adjusted IS NOT NULL AND timestamp > datetime('now', '-30 days') GROUP BY market_type

calibration_state.title: Calibration Bucket State
calibration_state.sql: SELECT bucket_range, ROUND(alpha / (alpha + beta), 3) as expected_accuracy, CAST(alpha + beta - 2 AS INTEGER) as sample_count FROM calibration_state

signal_tracker_lift.title: Signal Tracker Lift
signal_tracker_lift.sql: SELECT source_tier, info_type, market_type, present_winning + present_losing as total_present, CASE WHEN (present_winning + present_losing) >= 5 AND (absent_winning + absent_losing) >= 5 THEN ROUND(CAST(present_winning AS REAL) / (present_winning + present_losing) / (CAST(absent_winning AS REAL) / (absent_winning + absent_losing)), 3) ELSE NULL END as lift FROM signal_trackers ORDER BY lift DESC

daily_api_costs.title: Daily API Costs
daily_api_costs.sql: SELECT date, service, calls, ROUND(cost_usd, 4) as cost FROM api_costs ORDER BY date DESC, service

model_comparison.title: Model Comparison
model_comparison.sql: SELECT run_id, model_used, total_trades, ROUND(total_pnl, 2) as pnl, ROUND(avg_brier, 3) as brier FROM experiment_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC

headline_only_analysis.title: Headline-only Signal Analysis
headline_only_analysis.sql: SELECT headline_only_signal, COUNT(*) as trades, ROUND(AVG(brier_score_adjusted), 3) as avg_brier, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN pnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) as win_pct FROM trade_records WHERE brier_score_adjusted IS NOT NULL GROUP BY headline_only_signal

skip_reasons.title: Skip Reason Breakdown (Today)
skip_reasons.sql: SELECT skip_reason, COUNT(*) as count FROM trade_records WHERE action = 'SKIP' AND date(timestamp) = date('now') AND skip_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY skip_reason ORDER BY count DESC
